confirm.delete_user: Delete this user? This cannot be undone.
wof.description: Nothing here is public until approved. Check for accidental personal identifiers and anything that names a specific embassy officer before approving.
wof.toast_error: Could not update this story. Please try again.
partners.heading: Partners ({{count}})
partners.description: One generic system for any university, agency, or company — each gets its own tracked link, fully isolated from every other partner.
partners.slug_placeholder: Link slug (auto from name if left blank)
partners.empty: No partners yet. Add your first one to generate a trackable link.
partners.toast_create_error: Could not create partner. Please try again.
wait.heading: Wait Time Reports ({{count}})
wait.description: No moderation needed here — reports are structured dates, not free text. Routes need at least 5 reports before a community median is shown publicly.
tg.title: Telegram Bot
tg.description: Answers real visa document questions in Telegram using the same checklist data as the website — no AI, deterministic, always-correct matches.
tg.set_token_hint: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN via npx convex env set first.
tg.toast_connect_error: Could not connect the webhook. Make sure TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set.
wa.title: WhatsApp Bot
wa.description: Answers real visa document questions over WhatsApp using the same checklist data as the website — no AI, deterministic, always-correct matches. Built on Twilio's WhatsApp API.
wa.set_creds_hint: Set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, and TWILIO_WHATSAPP_NUMBER via npx convex env set first.
wa.webhook_hint: Unlike Telegram, Twilio has no API to register a webhook automatically — paste this deployment's webhook URL into the Twilio Console yourself, under WhatsApp Sandbox / Senders settings:
freshness.title: Visa Checklist Data Freshness
freshness.description: Every destination's last real-verification date. Anything 90+ days old is flagged — admins also get a weekly email digest when something falls behind.
employers.heading: Organisations ({{count}} most recent)
employers.description: Read-only oversight of every organisation type — employers, universities, law firms, and households. Per-member detail stays inside each organisation's own dashboard.
audit.title: Admin Action Audit Log
audit.description: Every plan change, role change, deletion, and agent verification, with who did it and when.
watch.publish_description: This emails every user watching this country in real time. Only publish real, verified policy changes.
watch.title_placeholder: e.g. "UK Visitor Visa Update — Financial evidence requirement has changed"
watch.details_placeholder: Explain exactly what changed and what affected applicants should do.
watch.toast_required: Country, title, and body are all required.
page.signin_body: Sign in with an admin account to continue.
page.access_denied_body: You do not have admin privileges to view this page.
